title: Amazon India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Amazon India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Amazon India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Nashik office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amazon India Advisory Limited:
Amazon India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India Advisory Limited!
